title: St. Moritz、Graubünden — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: St. Moritz、Graubündenの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

St. MoritzはGraubündenにある人口5,000の都市です。The world-famous Alpine resort in the Engadin valley, host of two Winter Olympics, known for its luxury hotels, frozen lake polo, and the legendary Cresta Run.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
